wanted_monsters.description: Each Wanted Monster grants +50% damage to the matching troop type on its scheduled days. Always prioritise attacking on your bonus days.
wanted_monsters.sunday: No Wanted Monster active on Sunday

doom_walker.season_2_reward: First kill each day grants a coal bonus - always kill the highest-level Doom Walker reachable
doom_walker.tip: Kill on Day 1 of the season for maximum early coal
doom_walker.respawn: Doom Walkers respawn daily - consistent kills accelerate season progress

polar_beasts.description: Season 2 Polar Storm dig site bosses - each beast is weak to one troop type
